gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/243)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/243)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) مَاءُ نِيلِ مِصْرَ يُمِيتُ الْقُلُوبَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, raising it, said,
‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The water of the Nile of Egypt deadens the hearts’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Ya‘qub ibn Yazid in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “’Amir al-Mu’minin, has said, ‘Water of the Nile of Misr (Egypt) deadens the heart.’”
